cursor_task.title: Phase 11 - Monetization, subscriptions, entitlements, quotas, and ads
cursor_task.context: Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/*.mdc, docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14.md and docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14_1_final.md before editing. The app must be monetization-ready without becoming a demo or over-integrating external providers too early.
cursor_task.goal: Implement the internal monetization foundation: plans, entitlements, quotas, local billing provider, ad placement abstraction, admin monetization management, and analytics events.

must_follow.item: Do not scatter hard-coded premium checks through the app.
All restricted features must be enforced by backend entitlement/quota checks.
Use provider interfaces for billing and ads.
Use a local/dev provider if real Stripe/ad provider credentials are unavailable.
Admin monetization actions must require RBAC and audit logs.
Ads must be placement-driven and must not interrupt core learning flows.

deliverables.item: PostgreSQL/Prisma models for plans, entitlements, quotas, subscriptions, usage counters/events, ad placements, and monetization audit records.
Backend MonetizationModule with EntitlementService and QuotaService.
AdProvider interface and LocalAdProvider or config-driven placeholder provider.
Backend guards/helpers for entitlement and quota enforcement.
Frontend hooks/components for entitlement status, quota meters, and respectful upgrade prompts.
Admin routes for plans, entitlements, quotas, subscriptions, ad placements, and monetization analytics.
Analytics events for paywall, quota limit, upgrade, subscription, and ad impressions/clicks.
Tests for entitlement resolution, quota consumption, quota reset periods, and admin permission enforcement.

quality_gate.item: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and Prisma validation.
Verify free and paid plan behavior with seeded/dev data.
Verify backend rejects restricted actions when entitlement/quota is missing.
Verify admin monetization routes are RBAC-protected.
